about.name: Ajay S
about.bio: AI Engineer specializing in Agentic AI systems, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. I design and deploy intelligent multi-agent systems that solve real-world problems with cutting-edge AI infrastructure.
about.focus: Agentic AI, RAG Systems & MCP Development

projects.name: Multi-Agent AI System
projects.description: Orchestrated autonomous AI agent swarm using CrewAI and AutoGen for complex task decomposition, planning, and execution with tool-use capabilities.

projects.name: RAG Knowledge Engine
projects.description: Enterprise-grade retrieval-augmented generation pipeline with hybrid search, semantic chunking, reranking, and multi-modal document processing.

projects.name: MCP Server Toolkit
projects.description: Production-ready Model Context Protocol server suite enabling AI assistants to interact with databases, APIs, and file systems through standardized tool interfaces.

projects.name: AI Code Reviewer
projects.description: Intelligent code review assistant using LLM-powered analysis for detecting bugs, security vulnerabilities, and suggesting architectural improvements.

projects.name: Conversational AI Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard for monitoring multi-agent AI systems with conversation tracking, token usage, and performance metrics.

projects.name: Intelligent Document Processor
projects.description: Multi-modal document understanding pipeline with OCR, table extraction, summarization, and semantic search across thousands of documents.

experience.details: Designing and deploying autonomous multi-agent AI systems, building production RAG pipelines, and developing MCP server integrations for enterprise clients.
Built end-to-end ML pipelines, fine-tuned LLMs for domain-specific tasks, and developed REST APIs for AI model serving with FastAPI and Docker.
Completed intensive training in deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and modern AI frameworks including PyTorch, Hugging Face, and LangChain.
Built web applications with Python, Flask, and React. Developed REST APIs and worked with SQL/NoSQL databases.

certifications.name: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer
